title: ilex montana var. lanceolata
intro: Ilex montana var. lanceolata, also known as the Mountain Holly, is a plant species that belongs to the Ilex genus, characterized by its glossy leaves and red berries. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Ilex montana var. lanceolata include its ability to soothe stomach ulcers, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, thereby protecting against cell damage and promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any plant-based remedies.
